thinking: The left circle (red/salmon colored) is clearly in front of the right circle (blue), as it occludes part of the blue circle.

Looking at the image, I need to determine which circle is in front of the other.

The left circle is cyan/blue and appears solid and opaque. The right circle is pink/magenta and appears more diffuse/soft.

The left (cyan) circle is in front.

Looking at the image, I need to determine which circle is in front of the other.

The right circle (blue) appears to be in front of the left circle (red/orange). The blue circle's edge is clean and sharp where it overlaps with the red circle, while the red circle appears to be behind the blue one - the red circle's right portion is hidden behind the blue circle.

The blue circle on the right is occluding the red circle on the left, meaning the right circle is in front.
